data.general: With Sun in 12th house and Moon in 10th house, you may be feeling a mix of emotions related to your career and public image. This can be an opportune time to reassess your goals and make necessary adjustments. As Jupiter in 1st house forms a harmonious aspect with Sun, you can expect a boost in confidence and energy.
data.luck: Your luck is influenced by Mars in 11th house, indicating potential for unexpected opportunities and gains. However, Saturn's presence in 9th house may also suggest some challenges and delays in the pursuit of your goals.
data.scope: The current transits suggest a focus on personal growth, career development, and relationships. You may need to navigate through some obstacles to achieve your objectives, but with determination and hard work, you can overcome them.
data.study: As Mercury is in 12th house, you may need to work harder to stay focused and motivated in your studies. With Jupiter's influence, you can expect a better understanding of complex concepts and improved analytical skills.
data.love: Venus in 2nd house and Ketu in 2nd house may suggest a sensitive and emotional approach to relationships. You may need to be more cautious and communicative to avoid misunderstandings and conflicts.
data.travel: With Rahu in 8th house, you may be drawn to unconventional or unexplored destinations. However, Saturn's presence in 9th house may also indicate some travel-related delays or obstacles.
